name: Action Board
tagline: Paste messy meeting notes. Get an action board you actually trust.
description:
Action Board turns raw meeting notes and brain-dumps into structured, editable action items — task, owner, deadline, and priority — that show up as cards you can approve and drag across To Do / In Progress / Done. The AI does the first pass; you stay the reviewer. Your board is saved automatically and you can push a clean summary back into the conversation with one click.

AI-native, not a chatbot: the assistant participates inside the workflow (extracting structure, updating the board) while the human keeps final say through approve / edit / move.
author: Hackathon Submission
